title: The Chain-Bound Rebel
short_theme: Stagger, binding, heavy attacks, riposte punishment.
lore_note: A known rebel and forbidden teacher, reinterpreted as a chained patron of punishment and weaponized defiance.

title: The Gilded Furnace
domain: greed, gold, furnace heat, debt, molten punishment
short_theme: Burn, ash trails, explosions, gold interactions, hazard pressure.
lore_note: A prince of greed reimagined as the furnace that melts value, debt, and flesh into punishment.

title: The Blind Judge
domain: judgment, sentencing, verdicts, execution, measured guilt
short_theme: Judged marks, precision timing, execution, Judgment meter gain.
lore_note: The infernal judge adapted from classical punishment mythology into Hell's bureaucratic court of verdicts.
